settings.heading: Your 5-minute facelift.
settings.subheading: Lúma sends gentle microcurrent through your skin to lift, sculpt and de-puff — a visibly snatched jawline, lifted cheeks and brighter skin. Salon results, on your bathroom counter.

settings.title: Instant lift
settings.text: Microcurrent stimulates facial muscles for a visibly lifted look.

settings.title: Sculpt & contour
settings.text: Define your jawline, cheekbones and brow.

settings.title: De-puff
settings.text: Drain morning puffiness in one short session.

settings.title: Salon results at home
settings.text: Skip the R600 facial — same tech, your bathroom.

settings.heading: The science of a snatched face
settings.text:
Your face has over 60 muscles — and like any muscle, they lose tone with age. Lúma's low-level microcurrent mirrors your body's own electrical signals to gently work those muscles, so your face looks lifted, firmer and more sculpted over time.

Glide it on with a little conductive gel, work upward and out, and watch the lift build session after session.

settings.title: Prep
settings.text: Smooth a layer of conductive gel over clean skin.

settings.title: Glide
settings.text: Move Lúma slowly upward and outward along your jaw, cheeks and brow.

settings.title: Glow
settings.text: 5 minutes, 5x a week. Lift now, lasting results in 4–6 weeks.

settings.quote: My jawline after two weeks?? I cancelled my facial appointment. The lift is real.
settings.name: Naledi M.

settings.quote: I use it before nights out — instant de-puff and my cheekbones actually pop. Worth every cent vs the R3k brands.
settings.name: Chloé V.

settings.quote: Sceptical at first but the under-eye puffiness in the mornings is gone. 5 minutes while my coffee brews.
settings.name: Ayesha K.

settings.question: Does it hurt?
settings.answer: Not at all — most people feel a gentle tingle or nothing. Start on the lowest level and build up as you get used to it.

settings.question: When will I see results?
settings.answer: You'll see an instant lift after the first session. With consistent use (5 mins, 5x a week), firmer, more sculpted results build over 4–6 weeks.

settings.question: Do I need a special gel?
settings.answer: Yes — microcurrent needs a water-based conductive gel to glide and carry the current. Add ours at checkout, or use any conductive/aloe gel.

settings.question: Who shouldn't use it?
settings.answer: Avoid if you're pregnant, have epilepsy, a pacemaker or other electrical implant. Check with your doctor if unsure.

settings.question: How long is delivery?
settings.answer: Your Lúma ships directly from our supplier — please allow 2–4 weeks, with tracking emailed to you. Shipping is free across South Africa.

settings.question: What if it's not for me?
settings.answer: You're covered by our 30-day money-back guarantee. Not lifted? Message us for a full refund.
